---
title: "TD4_github"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# ======= TD4 ========

# Question 1

```{r}
library(httr2)

req <- request(
  "https://data.nantesmetropole.fr/api/explore/v2.1/catalog/datasets/244400404_comptages-velo-nantes-metropole-boucles-comptage/records"
) |>
  req_url_query(limit = 100)

resp <- req_perform(req)

df_velo_info <- fromJSON(resp_body_string(resp))$results

df_velo_info
```
